title: the significance of the Miss lookalikes cross
display_title: the significance of the Miss lookalikes cross
wikitext:
[]: the significance of the Miss lookalike's cross             Quote Post by orcot » Thu Aug 19, 2021 12:21 am Sorry if it's a double post But when Miss lookalike/Rei Q pops theirs a small blue cross hovering above her for a instant. Is this Miss lookalike's soul? If so what do you think happened to it when it faded?

[]: Re: the significance of the Miss lookalike's cross             Quote Post by Zoop » Thu Aug 19, 2021 2:27 am Not an answer, but something to add, when she first starts to notice her body is failing (when the suit beeps) she finds a hole-like thing on the palm of her hand, like stigmata (because of the crucifixion of Lilith?)

[]: Re: the significance of the Miss lookalike's cross             Quote Post by Archer » Thu Aug 19, 2021 3:36 am Pretty sure it’s just a mini version of the giant crosses Angels create when they die. Kaworu says that her soul isn’t in her body (presumably it’s inside Unit-01 - it’s Rei2’s soul) so whatever IS inside her likely returned inside Unit-01 and merged with Rei2 to some degree or other. One possible piece of evidence for this is that we literally see her plugsuit transforming from black to white when she dies. There is literally no in-universe explanation for why her plugsuit should change color when she dies, but out-of-universe, it’s definitely supposed to make us recall Rei2, whose only visual distinction from ReiQ IS the color of her suit.

[]: Re: the significance of the Miss lookalike's cross             Quote Post by orcot » Thu Aug 19, 2021 9:00 am the plug suits in the rebuilds are weird, given how baggy they can be it's bizar Asuka's would rip from growing into a adult body. So your first opinion is that Miss lokealike fading blue cross was yust a visual representation perhaps to offset how fast she exploded? (still sort of think theirs a soul in there) ( but opinion can vary)

[]: Re: the significance of the Miss lookalike's cross             Quote Post by Archer » Thu Aug 19, 2021 9:09 am Nah, I’m saying it’s literally just the same as the big crosses the angles make when they’re killed, since Rei is definitely part angel/Adam/Lilith to some degree or other. As for what THAT cross means, it’s just imagery carried over from NGE, which was probably chosen because Anno or someone on the team thought it would look fuckin sick if the death of an Angel is marked by a giant cross of light. When Shinji asks Kaworu why ReiQ can’t just pilot Unit 13 with him, he responds something along the lines of “her soul isn’t in the right place”, so she wouldn’t be able to pick up/use the spear. What this actually means beyond the fact that Rei’s soul isn’t normal is up to interpretation.
